name: understand-dashboard
tagline: Starts a local web dashboard to visualize a codebase's knowledge graph, with a GitHub-release fast path and a pnpm/Vite build fallback.
verdict: Local-only (127.0.0.1) dashboard skill, transparent and well-structured with solid failure handling. Main risk: step 4 auto-downloads and npx-executes a GitHub release tarball with no checksum/signature check, unconfirmed and backgrounded — a supply-chain exposure if that release asset is ever compromised. No credential access, data exfiltration, or hidden i

highlights.summary: Step 4: 'npx --yes "$VIEWER_URL" "$PROJECT_DIR"' fetches a tarball from a GitHub Releases URL and executes it immediately with no checksum/signature verification, run 'in the background' without askin
